narrative:
Marysville 15 (precinct in Union County) has 1,249 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
